[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11011010 5
1 10111001 5
2 00001000 1
3 00000000 a
4 00001101 3
5 00110000 2
6 11011010 5
7 10111001 5

01 10 01001101 4
12 21 10000110 3
23 32 01100011 4
34 43 10110001 4
45 54 00001000 1 match 2
56 65 00011100 3
67 76 01110000 3
70 07 01111101 6

02 20 11001011 5
13 31 11100101 5
24 42 11010010 4
35 53 10111001 5 match 1 7
46 64 00010100 2
57 75 01101100 4
60 06 00001101 3 match 4
71 17 00110000 2 match 5

14 41 01010100 3
25 52 11011010 5 match 0 6
36 63 10100101 4
47 74 01100100 3
50 05 00010001 2
61 16 01000000 1
72 27 10110110 5

15 51 01011100 4
26 62 11000110 4
